(iv) The respondent’s case was considered with similarly situated 
persons. However, as his service certificate was not genuine, 
he was not appointed. His appointment was rejected by the 
Review Committee’s speaking order dated 28.03.2006. 
(v) 
Since the respondent’s service certificate is not genuine, he 
cannot be considered for appointment in any future post. 
Further, all vacancies in all cadres are being filled through 
direct recruitment. 
9. 
We have heard Ms. Aishwarya Bhati, learned ASG for the appellant 
and Mr. Basa Mithun Shashank, learned counsel for the respondent. 
10. The appellant’s case before us is that the list relied on by the High 
Court is not a seniority list but only a list of candidates having minimum 
qualification, who are eligible to attend the interview. However, upon 
closer scrutiny, we must reject this submission for the following 
reasons. First, this list has been placed before us by the respondent
